title: WAI-Lugs.jsonl flat format orphaned 111 lugs across 5 spokes — not in bytype/ canonical structure
signal: The old WAI-Lugs.jsonl flat file was still being written to alongside bytype/ on 5 spokes. 111 lugs existed only in the flat file, never migrated to bytype/. Migrated this session; flat files archived as WAI-Lugs-archived.jsonl. Root cause: no migration guard during the bytype/ transition.
rationale: Closeout scripts that still write to WAI-Lugs.jsonl need to be identified and updated to write to bytype/ only.
